utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: How we doing , you guys ready ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Mom already called this morning to remind me not to wear my hair up . Did you know my ears are not my best feature ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Some days it is all I can think about .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hi , sorry I am late , I could not find my bearings .
